{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/raw_uranium.png
|block_health=40
|block_resistance=17.5
|rotation=ore
|ore_range= Below -1500
}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
Uranium ore and coal can be crafted into [[Uranium Ingot|uranium ingots]].

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Items]]
[[Category:Ores]]
